title: Groups
description: Manage hierarchical user groups, memberships, and group-level invite quota summaries.
listDescription: This shows groups visible to the current account, including groups you own or have joined.
noSelectionDescription: Select a group from the left to view its details and members.
membersDescription: Add visible users to the current group.
noMembers: This group has no members yet.
dialogDescription: Groups support parent-child structure for quota distribution and permission inspection.
